queries.item: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ?:ab__stickers ( sticker_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL auto_increment, storefront_ids varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', usergroup_ids varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', position smallint(5) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'A', name_for_admin varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', type char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'C', style char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'T', display_on_lists mediumtext, display_on_detailed_pages varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'full_size', output_position_list char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'T', output_position_detailed_page char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'T', appearance mediumtext, pictogram_data mediumtext, conditions mediumtext, from_date int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, to_date int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_update_time int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_update_time_pictogram int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, vendor_edit char(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y', PRIMARY KEY (sticker_id), INDEX c_status (status, usergroup_ids), INDEX output_position_list (output_position_list), INDEX output_position_detailed_page (output_position_detailed_page), INDEX storefront_id (storefront_ids) ) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ?:ab__sticker_descriptions ( sticker_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL, lang_code char(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', name_for_desktop varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', name_for_mobile varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description mediumtext, pictogram_data mediumtext, PRIMARY KEY (sticker_id, lang_code) ) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ?:ab__sticker_images ( image_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL auto_increment, sticker_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, lang_code char(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (image_id), UNIQUE KEY sticker (sticker_id, lang_code) ) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ?:ab__sticker_pictograms ( image_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, sticker_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL, product_id mediumint(8) unsigned NOT NULL, lang_code char(2) NOT NULL, UNIQUE pictogram_image (image_id, sticker_id, product_id, lang_code) ) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
REPLACE INTO ?:privileges (privilege, is_default, section_id, group_id, is_view) VALUES ('ab__stickers.data.manage', 'Y', 'ab__addons', 'ab__stickers', 'N')
REPLACE INTO ?:privileges (privilege, is_default, section_id, group_id, is_view) VALUES ('ab__stickers.data.view', 'Y', 'ab__addons', 'ab__stickers', 'Y')
DELETE FROM ?:privileges WHERE section_id = 'ab__stickers' OR group_id = 'ab__stickers'
